chunks.title: The Widow's Oil
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit where Elisha helps a widow pay her debt through a miracle.

chunks.title: The Shunammite's Son
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative covering the woman's hospitality and Elisha's prophecy of a son.

chunks.title: Death and Resurrection
chunks.reason: A complete dramatic arc involving the child's death, the mother's journey, and Elisha's restoration of life.

chunks.title: The Stew with Bitter Herbs
chunks.reason: A self-contained incident where Elisha purifies a poisonous stew for the prophets.

chunks.title: The Loaves and Fishes
chunks.reason: A distinct miracle where Elisha feeds a hundred men with twenty loaves of barley.
